what: Auto-committing or pushing without explicit user request
why: User has strong preference against auto git operations. All agents and subagents must follow this rule.

what: Proposing SDK approaches without verifying actual installed exports/types
why: Burned by wrong ClaudeSDKClient proposal. Always check installed packages first.

what: Planning 10+ step tasks in a single session
why: Historical completion rate is 40%. Sessions consistently run out of context before finishing.

what: Deferring testing to the last phase
why: Testing is the most consistently skipped step. By the time it's reached, context is exhausted.

what: Moving project directories without understanding context fragmentation
why: Each path creates a separate session/memory silo. Internal-Tracker fragmented across 3 paths.

what: Storing code patterns in memory instead of decisions and constraints
why: Code patterns are derivable from the codebase. Decisions and user corrections are not.

what: Using Vue.js for Tour2Tech PMO projects
why: User explicitly rejected Vue.js in favor of Vanilla JS for this project family.

what: Adding keybinding editor or Cmd+K features to Clamper
why: User explicitly rejected these features for the Clamper project.
